perf_hint: a few octaves of value noise per curtain and no textures — frame time scales with pixel count and `curtains`; on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: curtains
params.description: How many curtains hang across the sky.

params.name: drift
params.description: How fast the curtains travel when nothing is playing.

params.name: sway
params.description: How much deeper the bass swings the curtains.

params.name: shimmer
params.description: How hard the air band flickers the curtains' folds.

params.name: drape
params.description: How far the light hangs down from each curtain's rim.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the sky.
